title: dampiera lindleyi
intro: Dampiera lindleyi, also known as the Blue Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Goodeniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dampiera lindleyi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Dampiera lindleyi can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
